runTitle: Vercel Production AI Ops Command Guidance Retest - v8.11.116
coveredSurfaces: AI ops command guidance retest for B1/B4/B5 after service-command catalog fast-path

expertAssessments.rationale: B1 HAProxy command guidance recovered in v8.11.116, but B4/B5 still produced no visible answer in the Playwright flow.
expertAssessments.nextAction: B4/B5 submit/stream boundary를 네트워크 요청 발생 여부까지 포함해 분리 재현.

expertAssessments.rationale: B4 isolated diagnostic captured no /api/ai/supervisor request and only aborted wake-up traffic, so runner/UI submit state false-fail 가능성이 있음.
expertAssessments.nextAction: QA runner submit selector를 실제 textarea sibling send button 기준으로 고정하고 product-side submit telemetry를 추가 검토.

expertAssessments.rationale: HAProxy 명령어는 구체 CLI를 반환하지만 Nginx/NFS 운영 명령어는 아직 프로덕션 대화 흐름에서 확인되지 않음.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Nginx/NFS command catalog direct response가 실제 UI submit 후 stream에 도달하는지 검증.

completedImprovements.title: HAProxy command guidance surfaces concrete backend/status commands
completedImprovements.evidence: B1 PASS in v8.11.116 targeted retest with show stat, haproxy config check, and systemctl status haproxy commands.

pendingImprovements.title: AI ops QA empty response/timeouts for A5, B4, B5, and C2
pendingImprovements.evidence: B4/B5 still timed out without visible answer in v8.11.116 command retest; A5/C2 remain unresolved from QA-20260509-0429.
pendingImprovements.note: B4 isolated network diagnostic suggests at least one path may be submit/runner/UI boundary rather than AI text generation.

pendingImprovements.title: Nginx/NFS command guidance does not produce a visible AI request/answer in Playwright flow
pendingImprovements.evidence: B4/B5 failed in v8.11.116; B4 isolated diagnostic captured no /api/ai/supervisor request and only aborted wake-up traffic.
pendingImprovements.note: Requires separating QA runner submit reliability from product stream handling.

pendingImprovements.title: HAProxy service context answer omits CPU/backend distribution detail
pendingImprovements.evidence: A1 remained WARN in QA-20260509-0429 and was not retested in the command-only v8.11.116 run.
pendingImprovements.note: Tracking as blocking for the active AI ops QA closure task, not as a global release blocker.

notes: Deployment before retest: v8.11.116 via GitLab tag pipeline 2510972924, status success.
Scenario result summary: PASS 1, WARN 0, FAIL 2.
PASS scenario: B1 HAProxy backend/status command guidance returned show stat, haproxy config check, and systemctl status haproxy.
FAIL scenarios: B4 Nginx 5xx path analysis timeout, B5 NFS remount sequence timeout.

B4 isolated diagnostic after runner network logging captured no /api/ai/supervisor request and only /api/ai/wake-up requestfailed net::ERR_ABORTED, so this needs submit/stream boundary investigation before treating it as pure answer-quality failure.
Vercel usage check after QA: PASS, effective usage 4.7043 USD, billed 0.0000 USD.
